title: helianthus heterophyllus
intro: Helianthus heterophyllus, also known as the variable sunflower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helianthus heterophyllus include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
